name: ygsnap
description: 一键生成项目代码快照，为 AI 辅助开发与架构审计而生。

scripts.build: VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && LDFLAGS="-X main.versionStr=v${VERSION}" && echo "Building godoc v${VERSION} ..." && GOOS=darwin GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags "$LDFLAGS" -o godoc-darwin-amd64 godoc.go && GOOS=darwin GOARCH=arm64 go build -ldflags "$LDFLAGS" -o godoc-darwin-arm64 godoc.go && GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags "$LDFLAGS" -o godoc-linux-amd64 godoc.go && GOOS=linux GOARCH=arm64 go build -ldflags "$LDFLAGS" -o godoc-linux-arm64 godoc.go && GOOS=windows GOARCH=amd64 go build -ldflags "$LDFLAGS" -o godoc-win-amd64.exe godoc.go && echo "Done."

author: 苑广山
